calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rachel Dodson appeared by zoom for and with Maria Fletcher by zoom.

Discussion was held regarding the notice issue. The court waives the notice defect. The Court granted the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The undated 1995 will is admitted to probate. Maria Elena Fletcher is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for November 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
